title: diphryllum ovatum
intro: Diphryllum ovatum, a type of fern plant, is a species of vascular plant in the family Selaginellaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Diphryllum ovatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antioxidant. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues and other health concerns.
